title: A Stray Dog Became a Cultural Symbol in Brazil. Now, Mexico Is Claiming It.
summary_full: To Brazilians, the ubiquitous caramel-colored mutts are a national icon. But a Mexican state has adopted them as its own homegrown symbol.
summary_public: To Brazilians, the ubiquitous caramel-colored mutts are a national icon. But a Mexican state has adopted them as its own homegrown symbol.
